Lawyer s Recognition Decision
tfU8 No 002 14 08 2006
Decision d accreditation d avocat
6 5S6 5 5 55 Investigation Instruction
tfU8 No 001 18 07 2007
We You Bunleng and Marcel Lemonde the Co Investigating Judges ofthe Extraordinary
Chambers inthe Courts ofCambodia
Noting the Law onthe establishment ofthe Extraordinary Chambers dated 27 October 2004
Noting Rule 22 ofthe Internal Rules ofthe Extraordinary Chambers
Noting thejudicial investigation initiated against
Last name KAING First name GuekEav Alias Duch Male
Born on 17 November 1942 in the village of Poeweuy CommunePeam Bang District Stoeung
Province Kompong Thom Nationality Cambodian Profession Teacher
Noting the designation by the Defense Support Section onrequest ofthe above mentioned person of
Mr Francois Roux as his Co lawyer dated 31 July 2007
Noting the Approval and Confirmation Letter ofthe Bar Association ofthe Kingdom ofCambodiaNo
409 dated 31 July 2007
1 We accredite and recognise Mr Francois Roux as the Co lawyer ofthe above mentionedperson for
aprovisional period until 31 Auguest2007
2 This lawyer is authorised to assist his client to freely communicated with him and to participate in
any investigative action
Datedthe 07 day ofAugust2007 inPhnom Penh
